resources:
Password must contain 1 letter, 1 number, 1 special char Password visibility image Profile Picture Back icon Program Image Sign in popup image Right Arrow Information Icon %s Icon About Miva Back "• " left arrow Calendar filter icon close Add Calendar Mode Icon Search Search inbox Radio Button color Select time Set time Cancel OK Join Thousands\nof Miva Students Search for a programme Search masters programmes Search undergraduate programmes Search undergraduate programme Undergraduate Programmes Postgraduate Programmes View All Apply for admission today! Apply Now Classes start September 24th, 2025 Chancellor’s\nAddress Join Our Student Community Connect with like-minded individuals, receive guidance from mentors, and engage in meaningful activities that enrich your university journey. Everything you need to know about Miva programmes. Quick answers to common inquiries. Learn more about... Direct Entry Admissions Inter-University Transfers Do you accept foreign students? Yes, we welcome international applicants. Can I defer my admission? Yes, under certain conditions. Contact admissions for help. Whom can I contact for help with my application? You can reach out to admissions@miva.university.com. Is there an orientation for new students? Yes, orientation is offered at the beginning of each intake. Can I change my program after being admitted? Yes, you can apply for a change of program after your first semester. Access your student account Are you a current Miva student or have you submitted an application? Log in to access your student account and continue learning. Sign in with your email Chancellor’s Address It gives me great pleasure to welcome you to Miva Open University, where our mission is to provide the highest quality education to all our students through a flexible, accessible, and innovative online learning environment. As the Chancellor of this esteemed institution, I am proud of the strides we have made in the past few years. Our faculty members are experts in their respective fields and are committed to helping our students achieve their academic and professional goals. Advance your education and land better jobs with your HND, IJMB, or JUPEB certificates. Get a high-quality, affordable degree designed for working professionals and career changers. Apply for Direct Entry Please note that submission of Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) results is not mandatory at this stage. However, upon admission to the university, the provided results will be thoroughly verified for authenticity and compliance with the stated criteria, including JAMB Regularisation. For detailed information on each programme’s requirements, visit the respective programme page. To be eligible for the Direct Entry Programme, applicants must have completed one of the following qualifications: Passes in relevant subjects (A’ Level, IJMB, International Baccalaureate (IB), JUPEB) Diploma in relevant areas (NCE, ND, HND) Professional Certificates (ICAN, KOMA, CIEN, ANL, ACCA, ATS, AIB, CISN, etc) Miva Stories YUSUF ADAM Graduates Students Chancellor\'s Address Background Programme Image Collapse Expand Student Community Play Icon YouTube video thumbnail Profile Arrow right icon Arrow down icon Arrow up icon Email icon Chancellor\'s Signature Direct Entry Graduate Image Inter-University Transfers Inter University Transfer Graduates Image Continue your degree programme at Miva and access affordable high-quality education and the flexibility of studying from anywhere. To be eligible for the inter-university transfer, applicants must meet the following requirements: ‘O’ level result with a minimum of five credits including Mathematics and English in not more than two sittings. Student copy of academic transcript with a minimum grade point average of 2.40 CGPA (Second class lower) on a 5.0 scale. Candidates will also be required to request an Official Academic Transcript from their current institution to be sent to " admissions@miva.university." Transfer to Miva Open University Retry No postgraduate programmes found No undergraduate programmes found Full Tuition" Tuition Per Session Tuition Per Semester "MODE OF STUDY" Study Duration Study Level Blended Learning Miva logo %d Programmes available Applications for September 2025 admission is ongoing. Applications for %s admission is ongoing. Apply before %s, to secure your place. Discount applies for full year’s payment. Apply before 30th May 2025, to secure your place. Discount applies for full year’s payment. Payment Plans Admission Requirements Programme Outline Pay per semester. No hidden charges. No additional costs. Pay per session. No hidden charges. No additional costs. Pay per month. No hidden charges. No additional costs. Discount applies for full year’s payment. Course Summary Save ₦%s Units Miva Open University offers a flexible payment plan for its degree programmes. You may choose to pay the year’s fee or per semester. Miva offers an affordable MBA programme with a flexible plan, so you can pay per semester or spread it out with monthly payments. About this faculty Tuition Per Month Search for courses Spread it out monthly with Edubanc. Quick actions Upcoming tasks You are currently not enrolled to any course. Register courses There are no upcoming activities scheduled at the moment Overdue You don’t have any results at this moment Continue learning Start learning %1$s%% Course Completed Recent searches No screen for %s There are no available courses for enrollment Tap to add description 5 minutes before 15 minutes before 30 minutes before 1 hour before 2 hours before 1 day before 2 days before 1 week before Overdue icon Status View event Date Course Description Reminder Delete Reminder Add Reminder Delete Event Edit URL Click here to join the lesson Add Submission View View Summary View Lesson Attempt Quiz Failed to load page. Please check your internet connection. Landscape Toggle Icon Portrait Toggle Icon close icon locked icon Remove Recent You Open PDF file Week 1: Discussion Forum Due: %d discussions
%d discussion
%d discussions
Go to discussion Couldn’t load discussions. Couldn’t load replies. Empty Discussion Icon There are no discussions yet in this forum Describe the technology advancements that can act as both an opportunity and a threat to businesses. Use a specific industry as an example "Prev activity" "Next activity" Reply Reply... Reply thread This is a question and answer forum.\nTo see other replies, you must first post your reply Access the URL Link Live lesson link: %s Save my choice Remove choice Save choice The result are not currently viewable Question %1$s Not answered Answer saved Please read the instructions below carefully. Take your time to read each question before selecting an answer. You have two attempts at this assessment. This is a practice quiz, so the scores will NOT count towards your final score. Re-attempt Review Start quiz Continue quiz Duration: Started: %1$s You are Correct! You are Not Correct! %1$s Mark Summary of attempt Attempts allowed: %1$s Opened: %1$s Opened: Finished: %1$s Next Previous Submit Check answer Tries remaining: 1 Correct Incorrect Try Again You have successfully submitted your answers Once you submit your answers, you won’t be able to change them. Questions without response: %1$s Finish Time up Done Take a photo Upload from gallery Browse files Permission Granted Upload document Upload Document Supported files: JPG or PDF (max. 50MB) Select a document type delete icon Pdf icon Online Submission Type here... Type in your feedback.. Please wait until the assessments are evaluated and the grades are calculated Assessment Submission Edit submission Add submission View submission "Please select a phase" Assessment phase Access peers Closed Conclusion Peer submissions for you to review Your grades Grade for submission: Save Please complete all assessment criteria. * Please read the instructions for submission. Assessment form Overall feedback Criterion %d check icon Your submission phase check icon Total: %d Downloading Pause Continue Continue downloads Settings" Notifications Downloads Legal No Yes Download quality Download over wifi only? Download over wifi only Are you sure you want to delete all downloads? Delete Low (144p) Medium (360p) Ask each time Wifi Terms of service Privacy policy Delete all downloads Tasks Study time Delete Delete Launch the activity Dear Students Peer - Rating As part of the group assignment, you will be conducting a peer-review of your group members’ contributions. This process is designed to encourage accountability, collaboration, and constructive feedback. To ensure fairness and professionalism, please follow these guidelines: Be Objective and Impartial Focus on the quality of work and level of contribution, not personal relationships or biases. Use the Provided Rubric or Criteria Refer to the evaluation rubric provided on the form and ensure your feedback aligns with the specific criteria outlined. Avoid Overly Harsh or Overly Generous Reviews Do not give excessively low or high scores without justification. Ensure your ratings are balanced and based on actual performance. Maintain Confidentiality Keep your evaluations private and do not share them with others outside the review process. Respect the privacy of your peers and the integrity of the process. Thank you for your cooperation, and good luck with your assignment! Grade icon %s Total: No %s yet Course Total: Practice Assessment Graded Assessment %s Icon Setting Icon Log out ID: %s Mute Group info User info Paused icon Rewind 10 seconds Forward 10 seconds Full screen icon Exit Full screen icon "Edited" Delivered Start your draft No conversation icon No chat No chat has been created yet 12 Participants Group chat " • " Your draft Today Unmute No Downloads You have no downloaded course activity Select all ₦%s C - Core E - Elective Loading curriculum... You are currently not enrolled to any course. No notifications You have no notifications yet Notifications Mark all as read Clear all Home Contact Us Courses Messages My Account FAQ Frequently asked questions Quick answers to common inquiries. How may we be of help? Please contact us via any of this platforms Chat with support Call us Send an email tel:+2347000444000 https://wa.me/+2349132300000 mailto:help@miva.university Icon Responses Month Months Semester Semesters Year Years Welcome, %1$s Refresh page Error Icon Oops, We couldn’t get this information. Kindly refresh the page to try again. If the issue continues, please reach out to support. Please wait, we’re processing your payment…
Maybe Later Enable Notification Go to Settings Get gentle reminders for your events, deadlines, to-dos, and lessons right when you need them. No internet connection. Please connect to the internet and try again. Change pin Request withdrawal Request Submitted! Your request has been submitted. Our team will review it and let you know if it’s approved. Tuition Fund Balance Continue Bank Name Enter bank Account Number Account Name Enter Account Name 0123456789 Withdrawal Reason Select a reason Tell Us More I understand that my withdrawal request will only be approved if it complies with the tuition policy, and that this request may be declined if I haven’t completed my final academic year. Money added to your Tuition Fund can ONLY be withdrawn when you conclude your final year. Payment schedule Enter Your Current PIN Verify Your Identity Please check your school email for the verification code we just sent you. Forgot PIN? Your PIN must match the one you set before. When would you like to finish paying your tuition? We recommend finishing payments before exams to ensure you\'re fully paid up and eligible to sit for your exams. How often would you like to pay? Enter the pin used to carry out your transactions. Code Edit Payment schedule Completion date This is when you want to finish paying your tuition. Resend OTP Resend code Frequency Payment Cycle This is how often you want to pay. Recommended savings We suggest setting aside this amount each time. We’ll send you reminders based on your schedule. ON OFF Have any issues? Contact support at help@miva.university Create a PIN Create Schedule Update Schedule Set Schedule Schedule Updated! Your payment schedule has been updated. If you add %1$s %2$s to your fund you will be able to pay your tuition by %3$s. Stay ahead with scheduled payments Pick a date and set how often you want to pay. We’ll send reminders so you’re always on track with your tuition payments. Create a six-digit PIN to approve your transactions. Confirm your PIN Confirm your six-digit PIN to approve your transactions. Go to Dashboard Changes Saved! Your pin has been changed Miva save get started icons. Terms and conditions apply. Terms and Conditions Get Started Keep money in bits with MivaSave towards paying your tuition fees. Set aside money in small amounts with MivaSave and be ready when it’s time to pay your tuition fees. Tuition payment is easier with MivaSave. I accept
"Funds saved are strictly intended for the " payment of tuition fees " and other approved academic charges."
"Students are " not permitted " to withdraw any portion of their funds during the course of their studies."
"Withdrawal of funds is allowed " only " after the student has completed their final academic year."
"A formal " written request " must be submitted to initiate a withdrawal after completion of studies."
"All withdrawal requests will be subject to " verification and approval " in accordance with the institution\'s financial policies."
Verify email Carousel icon Please check your school email for the verification code we just sent you. Enter Bank "Dropdown icon" Enter account number I agree to withdraw money added to my fund ONLY when I conclude my final year Set-up Withdrawal Account Invalid verification code Your PIN must match the one you set before. I’ll do this later Get Notified View MivaSave Make First Payment Bottom Spacer Animation My MivaSave Balance No Transaction Record Have any issues? Contact support at help@miva.university Add Funds Enter the amount you want to add to your save. ₦ 300,000.00 Continue The amount you entered goes over your tuition target. Please reduce the amount and try again. *Payment processing fee applicable Your fund just got a boost! You’ve added %1$s to your tuition fund. You can deposit, make payments and withdraw ₦ %1$s Recent Transactions Pay Tuition Deduction Top up Text copied to clipboard Failed Successful View Transaction Transaction Ref. - + 00 %1$s ***** Results Your application into the %1$s cohort has expired. You can resubmit your application to get into the %2$s You can resubmit your application to get into the %1$s Resubmit your current application in the new cohort, or start a fresh application to update your programme. We\'ll prefill your details to make it easier. Start New Application Resubmit Application More information Missed out this round? You can reapply easily with your info already filled in. Graduation image Choose an application type Undergraduate Application Apply for Bachelors Programme Postgraduate Application Apply for Masters Programme Continue Personal Details Please enter your personal details First Name Middle Name (Optional) Last Name Date of Birth Select date Gender Select an Option Nationality e.g Nigerian Confirm Programme Information Please Enter Your Programme Information Level of Study you are applying Level of Study you are applying for %1$s Programme e.g Business Administration Cohort e.g May 2026 Admission Type Select admission type e.g 100 Level Select Country Search country... Phone Number Enter phone number Contact Information Please Enter Your Contact Information E-mail Address example@gmail.com Please enter a valid email address Enter your phone number WhatsApp Number Residential Address e.g House 2, Admiralty way Country e.g Nigeria State e.g Abuja City e.g FCT No country found Try a different search term Employment Information Please Enter Other information Employment Status e.g Employed Industry e.g Education Current Employer/Company Name e.g Miva Open University Upload Documents Upload your documents to complete the application Uploaded Add more Add more icon Camera permission denied Failed to create image file O\'Level Result Optional: To combine two results, upload the second here Transcript Others Postgraduate Diploma O\'Level Certificate CV or Other Certificates Your application has been submitted successfully! Back to Dashboard EMAIL Phone number must be at least %1$d digits Phone number must not exceed %1$d digits Notice icon Payments View Receipt
